English | Az…ôrbaycanca

Orta L√ľńü…ôt

Orta L√ľńü…ôt

Orta s…ôviyy…ô √ľ√ß√ľn 180 …ôh…ômiyy…ôtli s√∂z√ľ m…ônims…ôyin! Bu l√ľńü…ôt akademik v…ô peŇü…ôkar m√ľhitl…ôrd…ô tez-tez istifad…ô olunan s√∂zl…ôrd…ôn ibar…ôtdir.

Orta S…ôviyy…ô HaqqńĪnda

Bu orta s…ôviyy…ô l√ľńü…ôt kolleksiyasńĪ …ôsas l√ľńü…ôti m…ônims…ômiŇü v…ô daha m√ľr…ôkk…ôb s√∂zl…ôr √∂yr…ônm…ôk ist…ôy…ôn Ňüagirdl…ôr √ľ√ß√ľn t…ôrtib edilmiŇüdir. H…ôr s…ôhif…ôd…ô 12 s√∂z var v…ô aŇüańüńĪdakńĪlar daxildir:

  • D…ôqiq t…ôl…ôff√ľz - Beyn…ôlxalq Fonetik ∆Źlifba (IPA) g√∂st…ôril…ôrk…ôn
  • Nitq hiss…ôsinin m√ľ…ôyy…ônl…ôŇüdirilm…ôsi - ńįsim, fel, sif…ôt v…ô s.
  • DetallńĪ t…ôrifl…ôr - S√∂z m…ônasńĪnńĪn tam baŇüa d√ľŇü√ľlm…ôsi √ľ√ß√ľn
  • Kontekst misallarńĪ - Real istifad…ô v…ôziyy…ôtl…ôrind…ô
  • Sinoniml…ôrin siyahńĪsńĪ - M…ônaca yaxńĪn s√∂zl…ôr

√Ėyr…ônm…ô YanaŇümasńĪ

Bu orta s…ôviyy…ô s√∂zl…ôri m…ônims…ôm…ôk √ľ√ß√ľn:

  1. M…ôna f…ôrql…ôrini √∂yr…ônin - Sinoniml…ôrl…ô m√ľqayis…ô ed…ôr…ôk
  2. Formal kontekstd…ô istifad…ô edin - YazńĪlńĪ iŇül…ôrd…ô t…ôtbiq edin
  3. Tematik qruplamalara diqq…ôt edin - OxŇüar m√∂vzulu s√∂zl…ôri birlikd…ô √∂yr…ônin
  4. PeŇü…ôkar s√∂hb…ôtl…ôrd…ô iŇül…ôdin - R…ôsmi m√ľhitl…ôrd…ô istifad…ô edin
  5. M…ôtn oxumańüńĪ artńĪrńĪn - Bu s√∂zl…ôri …ôsl m…ôtinl…ôrd…ô axtarńĪn

L√ľńü…ôt S…ôhif…ôl…ôri

S…ôhif…ô 1

Acquire, Approach, Authority, Benefit, Capacity, Certainly, Community, Complex, Concept, Consequence, Consider, Context

S…ôhif…ô 2

Culture, Develop, Economy, Element, Environment, Establish, Event, Evidence, Factor, Feature, Focus, Function

S…ôhif…ô 3

Generate, Government, Impact, Implement, Individual, Industry, Information, Institution, Invest, Issue, Knowledge, Language

S…ôhif…ô 4

Particular, Perspective, Phenomenon, Potential, Preliminary, Primarily, Procedure, Proportion, Pursue, Remarkable, Reluctant, Significant

S…ôhif…ô 5

Subsequent, Substitute, Sufficient, Technique, Temporary, Transition, Ultimate, Undertake, Valid, Vary, Version, Volume

S…ôhif…ô 6

Acknowledge, Analyze, Approximately, Assume, Available, Benefit, Calculate, Challenge, Communicate, Community, Compare, Complete

S…ôhif…ô 7

Complex, Concept, Conduct, Conference, Confidence, Confirm, Consider, Construct, Contain, Context, Continue, Contribute

S…ôhif…ô 8

Create, Culture, Decision, Define, Demand, Describe, Design, Develop, Difference, Discuss, Distribute, Document

S…ôhif…ô 9

Economy, Education, Effective, Element, Emergency, Emphasis, Employment, Environment, Equipment, Especially, Event, Evidence

S…ôhif…ô 10

Example, Experience, Explain, Express, Factor, Feature, Finance, Focus, Function, Future, Global, Government

S…ôhif…ô 11

History, Identity, Importance, Include, Increase, Individual, Industry, Information, Institution, Involve, Issue, Knowledge

S…ôhif…ô 12

Language, Legal, Level, Location, Management, Material, Medical, Method, Model, Natural, Network, Normal

S…ôhif…ô 13

Object, Opportunity, Organization, Original, Pattern, Performance, Period, Personal, Physical, Policy, Popular, Position

S…ôhif…ô 14

Practice, Present, Previous, Primary, Process, Product, Professional, Project, Provide, Public, Quality, Question

S…ôhif…ô 15

Range, Reason, Receive, Relationship, Research, Resource, Respond, Responsibility, Result, Society, Structure, System

Tez Naviqasiya

  • S…ôyah…ôtiniz…ô BaŇülayńĪn: S…ôhif…ô 1 il…ô baŇülayńĪn
  • √Ėyr…ônm…ôy…ô Davam Edin: S…ôhif…ôl…ôr arasńĪnda …ôvv…ôlki/n√∂vb…ôti d√ľym…ôl…ôrind…ôn istifad…ô edin
  • ńįr…ôlil…ôyiŇüi ńįzl…ôyin: Bu icmalńĪna qayńĪdńĪb inkiŇüafńĪnńĪzńĪ g√∂r√ľn

√Ėyr…ônm…ôni ∆Źlaq…ôl…ôndirin

ńįr…ôlil…ômiŇü T…ôcr√ľb…ô √ľ√ß√ľn Qrammatika M√∂vzularńĪ

  • Passiv S…ôs - M√ľr…ôkk…ôb l√ľńü…ôti passiv quruluŇülarda istifad…ô edin
  • Modal Feill…ôr - ńįr…ôlil…ômiŇü l√ľńü…ôtl…ô r…ôy v…ô imkanlarńĪ ifad…ô edin
  • DolayńĪ Nitq - Akademik l√ľńü…ôti dolayńĪ ifad…ôl…ôrd…ô t…ôtbiq edin

L√ľńü…ôtinizi SńĪnayan Hekay…ôl…ôr

  • ńįŇü M√ľsahib…ôsi - Kontekstd…ô peŇü…ôkar l√ľńü…ôt
  • Bazarda Bir G√ľn - M…ôd…ôni v…ô biznes l√ľńü…ôti
  • ńįtirilmiŇü A√ßar - Problem h…ôlli l√ľńü…ôti

Orta s…ôviyy…ô ńįngilis l√ľńü…ôtin…ô yiy…ôl…ônm…ôy…ô hazńĪrsńĪnńĪz? S…ôhif…ô 1 il…ô baŇülayńĪn v…ô 15 s…ôhif…ônin hamńĪsńĪnńĪ tamamlayaraq academic v…ô peŇü…ôkar kommunikasiya bacarńĪqlarńĪnńĪzńĪ artńĪrńĪn!
